true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> chance to reduce the cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>The Culprit is You!</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>【犯人はあなたです!】</color>のスキルターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少させる。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>범인은 바로 당신!</color> 스킬의 쿨타임을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>的几率使<color=#28d9ed>犯人就是你!</color>的技能冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

SKT_BURST_2.effect: Increases the chance to reduce cooldown by 80%
SKT_BURST_2.effect_jp: スキルターン減少の発生率+80%
SKT_BURST_2.effect_zh: 冷却时间减少触发几率+80%

true_desc_levels.1: (Triggered Effect) When an ally uses an attack that targets all enemies, grants increased Attack to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>, and increases Priority of ally Mages by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: (発動効果)味方が全体攻撃時、味方全体の攻撃力を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせ、魔法型の味方の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPさせる。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: (발동 효과) 아군이 전체 공격을 했을 때, 아군 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color>동안 공격력을 증가시키고, 아군의 마법형 캐릭터는 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: (触发效果)友军发动全体攻击时,使全体友军攻击力提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,并使友军中魔法型角色的行动值提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
true_desc_levels.2: (Triggered Effect) When an ally uses an attack that targets all enemies, grants increased Attack to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>, and increases Priority of ally Mages by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>.

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks all enemies and increases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage</color> of all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nAfter using the skill, decreases cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Thinking Time</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージ</color>をUPさせる。\nスキル使用後、<color=#28d9ed>シンキングタイム</color>のスキルターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少させる。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 피해</color>를 증가시킵니다.\n스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>씽킹 타임</color> 스킬의 쿨타임을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使我方全体的<color=#28d9ed>暴击伤害</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n使用技能后,使<color=#28d9ed>思考时间</color>技能的冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks all enemies and increases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage</color> of all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nAfter using the skill, decreases cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Thinking Time</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージ</color>をUPさせる。\nスキル使用後、<color=#28d9ed>シンキングタイム</color>のスキルターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少させる。
true_desc_levels.2_kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 피해</color>를 증가시킵니다.\n스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>씽킹 타임</color> 스킬의 쿨타임을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.2_zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使我方全体的<color=#28d9ed>暴击伤害</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n使用技能后,使<color=#28d9ed>思考时间</color>技能的冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks all enemies and increases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage and Critical Hit Chance</color> of all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nAfter using the skill, decreases cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Thinking Time</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.3_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージおよび会心率</color>をUPさせる。\nスキル使用後、<color=#28d9ed>シンキングタイム</color>のスキルターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少させる。
true_desc_levels.3_kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 피해 및 치명 확률</color>을 증가시킵니다.\n스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>씽킹 타임</color> 스킬의 쿨타임을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.3_zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使我方全体的<color=#28d9ed>暴击伤害和暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n使用技能后,使<color=#28d9ed>思考时间</color>技能的冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks all enemies and increases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage and Critical Hit Chance</color> of all allies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.\nAfter using the skill, decreases cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Thinking Time</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.4_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージおよび会心率</color>をUPさせる。\nスキル使用後、<color=#28d9ed>シンキングタイム</color>のスキルターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少させる。
true_desc_levels.4_kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 피해 및 치명 확률</color>을 증가시킵니다.\n스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>씽킹 타임</color> 스킬의 쿨타임을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.4_zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使我方全体的<color=#28d9ed>暴击伤害和暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。\n使用技能后,使<color=#28d9ed>思考时间</color>技能的冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks all enemies and increases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage and Critical Hit Chance</color> of all allies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.\nAfter using the skill, decreases cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Thinking Time</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.5_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージおよび会心率</color>をUPさせる。\nスキル使用後、<color=#28d9ed>シンキングタイム</color>のスキルターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少させる。
true_desc_levels.5_kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 피해 및 치명 확률</color>을 증가시킵니다.\n스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>씽킹 타임</color> 스킬의 쿨타임을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.5_zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使我方全体的<color=#28d9ed>暴击伤害和暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。\n使用技能后,使<color=#28d9ed>思考时间</color>技能的冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

3: +2 turns Increased Critical Hit Chance to all allies
3_jp: 味方全体の会心率+2ターン

true_desc_levels.1: <color=#ffd732>Chain Finish Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to grant increased Attack to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(トドメ)</color>:攻撃後、味方全体の攻撃力が<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPする。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>UPさせる。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 피니시 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>의 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 아군 전체의 공격력이 증가합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 공격 후 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 증가시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携收尾效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使全体友军的攻击力提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:攻击后,使自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。
true_desc_levels.2: <color=#ffd732>Chain Finish Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to grant increased Attack to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
true_desc_levels.2_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(トドメ)</color>:攻撃後、味方全体の攻撃力が<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPする。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>UPさせる。
true_desc_levels.2_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 피니시 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>의 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 아군 전체의 공격력이 증가합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 공격 후 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 증가시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.2_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携收尾效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使全体友军的攻击力提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:攻击后,使自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。
